name: file-editor
description: Lightweight file editor with version history and diffs. Open a host file (browse or type a path), edit it, and Save — each save snapshots a version. Pick any version to diff against the current buffer (unified +/- hunks) or revert to it. Service-backed — service.js reads/writes the file, stores snapshots under .web-chat/file-versions/, and diffs via the daemon's line-diff engine; the pane drives it with the control key `editor_ctl`. Params: { path?: string (open on mount), root?: string (base dir, default the repo), unfenced?: boolean (allow any host path, default false — paths are fenced to the project root) }.
